title: peliosanthes micrantha
intro: Peliosanthes micrantha, also known as the Dwarf Peliosanthes or Chinese Peliosanthes, is a type of flowering plant in the Asparagaceae family, characterized by its small white flowers and tuberous roots. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Peliosanthes micrantha include reducing fever, alleviating pain and swelling, and improving cardiovascular health. The plant can be prepared as an herbal decoction or tea, or used in capsule or powder form, making it a valuable addition to traditional healing practices.
